functions.title: Guide Book #86
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #86§r
§lFire Bird§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Passive
•§lMob type§r: Small bird, Fire-elemental, Animal, Aerial.
•§lSpawns in§r: All nether biomes.
•§lHealth§r: 16 §o(Wild)§r | 22 §o(Tamed)§r

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.23
•§lFly speed§r: 0.35
•§lImmune to§r: Fall Damage
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Lava.
•§lTempted by§r: Torchflower Seeds, Pitcher Pod.
•§lHealed by§r: Torchflower Seeds, Pitcher Pod.
•§lBreeds with§r: Pitcher Pod

•§lEgg laying§r: 1-3 Fire Bird Eggs §o(Wild)§r | 2-4 Fire Bird Eggs §o(Tamed)§r
•§lAging by§r: Torchflower Seeds, Pitcher Pod.
•§lTamed by§r: Torchflower Seeds
•§lPossible drops§r: Fire Feather, XP Orbs.
•They takes damage when in

contact with water or when it rains.
•Wild Fire Bird can randomly sit.
•Tamed Fire Bird can be sat down.
•Adult Fire Bird can spawn or produce a §lFire Feather§r every 10 to 15 minutes when wild or every 5 to 10 minutes when tamed.

•They can slowly regenerate their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Fire Bird can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
•They can transform into a §lSoul Fire Bird§r when interacting with Soul Fire, Soul Sand, or a Soul Campfire.
